name: Fried Beef with Watercress Salad (Bo Luc Lac)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut meat into cubes measuring 3/4 inch.
2. Mix with 2 cloves garlic, 1/2 tsp pepper, 1/2 tsp sugar, and 1 tbsp oil. Let the mixture stand for 1 hour to marinate.
3. Cut onion lengthwise into very thin strips.
4. Marinate onion in vinegar, 1/4 tsp salt, 1 tsp sugar, 1/4 tsp pepper, and 2 tbsp oil.
5. Rinse watercress and drain well. Arrange on a platter.
6. Heat 2 tbsp oil over high heat.
7. Add a pinch of sugar and the remaining garlic to the hot oil.
8. Fry until fragrant.
9. Add meat and stir fry for 2 minutes, until just cooked.
10. Top the watercress with meat, then add the onion mixture.
